'''thopasaka''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Adjectives|adjective]] meaning "[[Wikt:rubbishy|rubbishy]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| th-p-s
|-
! Word class
| [[Adjective]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:rubbishy|rubbishy]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| thopasaka
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
''Positive degree, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thopasithi|thopasithi]] || [[word:thopasiji|thopasiji]] || [[word:thopasishi|thopasishi]] || [[word:thopasiki|thopasiki]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thopasuthuthu|thopasuthuthu]] || [[word:thopasujuju|thopasujuju]] || [[word:thopasushushu|thopasushushu]] || [[word:thopasukuku|thopasukuku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:thopasuthu|thopasuthu]] || [[word:thopasuju|thopasuju]] || [[word:thopasushu|thopasushu]] || [[word:thopasuku|thopasuku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:thopasufthuf|thopasufthuf]] || [[word:thopasufjuf|thopasufjuf]] || [[word:thopasufshuf|thopasufshuf]] || [[word:thopasufkuf|thopasufkuf]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:thopasethe|thopasethe]] || [[word:thopaseje|thopaseje]] || [[word:thopaseshe|thopaseshe]] || [[word:thopaseke|thopaseke]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:thopasothotho|thopasothotho]] || [[word:thopasojojo|thopasojojo]] || [[word:thopasoshosho|thopasoshosho]] || [[word:thopasokoko|thopasokoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:thopasotho|thopasotho]] || [[word:thopasojo|thopasojo]] || [[word:thopasosho|thopasosho]] || [[word:thopasoko|thopasoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:thopasofthof|thopasofthof]] || [[word:thopasofjof|thopasofjof]] || [[word:thopasofshof|thopasofshof]] || [[word:thopasofkof|thopasofkof]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[collective]] || [[word:thopasïfthïf|thopasïfthïf]] || [[word:thopasïfjïf|thopasïfjïf]] || [[word:thopasïfshïf|thopasïfshïf]] || [[word:thopasïfkïf|thopasïfkïf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[plural]] || [[word:thopasïfthïfthïf|thopasïfthïfthïf]] || [[word:thopasïfjïfjïf|thopasïfjïfjïf]] || [[word:thopasïfshïfshïf|thopasïfshïfshïf]] || [[word:thopasïfkïfkïf|thopasïfkïfkïf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[singular]] || [[word:thopasïfthïf|thopasïfthïf]] || [[word:thopasïfjïf|thopasïfjïf]] || [[word:thopasïfshïf|thopasïfshïf]] || [[word:thopasïfkïf|thopasïfkïf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[zero]] || [[word:thopasïfthïf|thopasïfthïf]] || [[word:thopasïfjïf|thopasïfjïf]] || [[word:thopasïfshïf|thopasïfshïf]] || [[word:thopasïfkïf|thopasïfkïf]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:thopasæthæ|thopasæthæ]] || [[word:thopasæjæ|thopasæjæ]] || [[word:thopasæshæ|thopasæshæ]] || [[word:thopasækæ|thopasækæ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:thopasathatha|thopasathatha]] || [[word:thopasajaja|thopasajaja]] || [[word:thopasashasha|thopasashasha]] || [[word:thopasakaka|thopasakaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:thopasatha|thopasatha]] || [[word:thopasaja|thopasaja]] || [[word:thopasasha|thopasasha]] || [[word:thopasaka|thopasaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:thopasafthaf|thopasafthaf]] || [[word:thopasafjaf|thopasafjaf]] || [[word:thopasafshaf|thopasafshaf]] || [[word:thopasafkaf|thopasafkaf]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[positive]].none || [[word:thopasasha|thopasasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[visual]] || [[word:thopashësha|thopashësha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:thopasrosha|thopasrosha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[inferential]] || [[word:thopasmusha|thopasmusha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[optative]] || [[word:thopasyasha|thopasyasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gothopasnkshësha|gothopasnkshësha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gothopasnkrosha|gothopasnkrosha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gothopasnkmusha|gothopasnkmusha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gothopasnkyasha|gothopasnkyasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].none || [[word:thopapasasha|thopapasasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[visual]] || [[word:thopapashësha|thopapashësha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:thopapasrosha|thopapasrosha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:thopapasmusha|thopapasmusha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[optative]] || [[word:thopapasyasha|thopapasyasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gothopapasnkshësha|gothopapasnkshësha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gothopapasnkrosha|gothopapasnkrosha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gothopapasnkmusha|gothopapasnkmusha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gothopapasnkyasha|gothopapasnkyasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].none || [[word:thepæsasha|thepæsasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[visual]] || [[word:thepæshësha|thepæshësha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:thepæsrosha|thepæsrosha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:thepæsmusha|thepæsmusha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[optative]] || [[word:thepæsyasha|thepæsyasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gothepæsnkshësha|gothepæsnkshësha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gothepæsnkrosha|gothepæsnkrosha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gothepæsnkmusha|gothepæsnkmusha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gothepæsnkyasha|gothepæsnkyasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].none || [[word:thopfasasha|thopfasasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[visual]] || [[word:thopfashësha|thopfashësha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:thopfasrosha|thopfasrosha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:thopfasmusha|thopfasmusha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[optative]] || [[word:thopfasyasha|thopfasyasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gothopfasnkshësha|gothopfasnkshësha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gothopfasnkrosha|gothopfasnkrosha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gothopfasnkmusha|gothopfasnkmusha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gothopfasnkyasha|gothopfasnkyasha]]
|}

''36 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|92df33c}}
